caption: In a desolate outdoor setting featuring a damaged white building and rubble-strewn ground, soldiers in camouflage uniforms are present. In the foreground, a soldier wearing a black balaclava and tactical gear holds a tan-colored assault rifle, facing slightly toward the camera. In the background, another soldier in similar camouflage stands near the building. The text "Hero of Ukraine" is visible in the upper left of the scene, and a red and white "13" logo appears in the upper right. As the sequence progresses, the soldier in the foreground shifts their position and grip on the weapon, moving from a side-profile view to facing more directly toward the camera, while the soldier in the background remains relatively stationary. The landscape is bleak, with sparse, dry vegetation and debris scattered across the greyish-brown earth.
